title: DeepSeekCell: an ontology-guided large language model framework and interactive Shiny platform for explainable cell type annotation in single-cell RNA sequencing
description: DeepSeekCell is an R package and Shiny application for marker-driven, ontology-guided, explainable cell type annotation in single-cell RNA sequencing. It supports DeepSeek API and local Ollama backends, maps predictions to Cell Ontology identifiers, exports reports, and includes reproducible benchmarking scripts.
